intro: A perfect ring of pale mushrooms grows in the grass, each cap faintly luminous. The old stories say a fairy circle either blesses those who taste it or plays a little trick on them.
title: The Mushroom Circle
description: A ring of glowing mushrooms in the meadow. Tasting one is a gamble, an even chance at a sweet windfall for your team or a small mischievous trick. Or you can simply step around the ring and leave it be.

1.label: Taste a mushroom
1.tooltip: (?) An even chance: a boon for your team, or a minor trick
1.selected: You pick the ripest cap from the ring and take a bite...

2.label: Leave the ring be
2.selected: You step around the ring and walk on.

windfallCandy: A warm, sweet rush spreads through you and your whole team! Everyone feels a little stronger. (+{{candyAmount}} Candy each)
curseMoney: The cap turns bitter on your tongue. A prankish little spirit cackles and lifts {{moneyLost}} from your bag before vanishing into the grass!
